# Lucid Rents

> Apartment building intelligence platform. Search any building across major U.S. cities to see violations, tenant complaints, 311 reports, crime stats, rent data, and honest tenant reviews — all sourced from public records and real renters.

## Cities Covered

- New York City, New York
- Los Angeles, California
- Chicago, Illinois
- Miami, Florida
- Houston, Texas

## What You Can Find

- **Building Reports**: Violations, complaints, 311 calls, litigation history, and building scores for individual addresses
- **Landlord Profiles**: Portfolio size, violation history, and tenant ratings for property owners
- **Tenant Reviews**: First-hand experiences from renters covering noise, pests, management, maintenance, and more
- **Crime Data**: Neighborhood crime statistics by zip code sourced from local police departments (NYPD, LAPD, CPD, MDPD, HPD)
- **Rent Data**: Fair market rents, median rents, and rent stabilization status where available
- **Neighborhood Pages**: Aggregated building data, scores, and trends by zip code
- **Building Comparisons**: Side-by-side comparison of multiple buildings

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://lucidrents.com): Search any building by address or zip code
- [NYC Buildings](https://lucidrents.com/nyc/buildings): Browse all New York City buildings
- [Los Angeles Buildings](https://lucidrents.com/CA/Los-Angeles/buildings): Browse all Los Angeles buildings
- [Chicago Buildings](https://lucidrents.com/IL/Chicago/buildings): Browse all Chicago buildings
- [Miami Buildings](https://lucidrents.com/FL/Miami/buildings): Browse all Miami buildings
- [Houston Buildings](https://lucidrents.com/TX/Houston/buildings): Browse all Houston buildings
- [Rent Affordability Calculator](https://lucidrents.com/rent-affordability-calculator): Calculate how much rent you can afford
- [NYC Tenant Rights Guide](https://lucidrents.com/guides/nyc-tenant-rights): Know your rights as a NYC renter
- [LA Tenant Rights Guide](https://lucidrents.com/guides/la-tenant-rights): Know your rights as an LA renter

## Building Page URL Pattern

Building pages follow the pattern: `https://lucidrents.com/[city]/building/[borough-or-area]/[address-slug]`

Examples:
- `https://lucidrents.com/nyc/building/manhattan/123-main-street`
- `https://lucidrents.com/CA/Los-Angeles/building/hollywood/456-sunset-blvd`

## Data Sources

Lucid Rents aggregates public data from city agencies including:
- NYC: HPD violations, DOB complaints & permits, 311 service requests, NYPD crime data
- Los Angeles: LAHD violations, LADBS permits, LAPD crime data, RSO registry
- Chicago: City of Chicago building violations, CPD crime data
- Miami: Miami-Dade code violations, MDPD crime data
- Houston: City of Houston violations, HPD crime data
